text: Science has a clearer story about neuroinflammation than social media does. Neuroinflammation is the brain's response to injury or disease. But excessive inflammation can lead to serious problems, like neurodegenerative diseases. Studies show that conditions like Alzheimer’s and multiple sclerosis involve neuroinflammation. Understanding this process helps researchers develop better treatments and preventative measures. Curious about how to protect your brain? Follow for more insights!
